ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Use `data` to access the Zotero item data and return a relative filepath. You may return an empty string to skip note generation for the item.
ast.target: 使用 `data` 访问 Zotero 条目数据并返回相对文件路径。您可以返回空字符串以跳过该条目的笔记生成。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Use `data` to access the Zotero item data and return the note content
ast.target: 使用 `data` 访问 Zotero 条目数据并返回笔记内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zotero API key for read-only access
ast.target: 用于只读访问的 Zotero API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Read from your locally running Zotero App instead of using the web API
ast.target: 从本地运行的 Zotero 应用程序读取，而不是使用网络 API

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync Zotero library on Obsidian startup
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时同步 Zotero 库

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync interval in minutes (leave blank to disable)
ast.target: 同步间隔（分钟）（留空则禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generated Zotero note files are cached to improve performance; if you make changes to the note files when not using the plugin, you can use this button to clear the cache.
ast.target: 生成的 Zotero 笔记文件会被缓存以提高性能；如果您在不使用插件时对笔记文件进行了更改，可以使用此按钮清除缓存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The JavaScript code in the left column below is used to generate the notes from items in your Zotero library. You can preview code changes by selecting a file from the preview list.  Once you are done, you can apply the changes to your vault by clicking the "Apply" button.
ast.target: 左栏下方的 JavaScript 代码用于从您的 Zotero 库中的条目生成笔记。您可以通过从预览列表中选择一个文件来预览代码更改。完成后，您可以点击“应用”按钮将更改应用到您的保险库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Zotero Sync: Cannot connect to API. Is Zotero running?
ast.target: Zotero 同步：无法连接到 API。Zotero 是否正在运行？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Authenticated with Zotero, syncing libraries. This may take a while...
ast.target: 已通过 Zotero 认证，正在同步库。这可能需要一些时间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Switched to local sync, syncing libraries. This may take a while...
ast.target: 已切换到本地同步，正在同步库。这可能需要一些时间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Zotero Sync: Updating vault (this may take a while)
ast.target: Zotero 同步：正在更新保险库（这可能需要一些时间）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Zotero 同步：保险库已更新
